purpose: Core trial signup records: email, name, user type (student/parent/educator), and signup timestamp. Serves as the entry point for all new users from the marketing website.

important_fields.name: id
important_fields.note: Unique identifier for each signup record.

important_fields.name: email
important_fields.note: User's email address. Unique constraint prevents duplicate signups. Indexed for fast lookups.

important_fields.name: name
important_fields.note: User's full name (student, parent, or educator).

important_fields.name: user_type
important_fields.note: Distinguishes user persona (student preparing for JEE, parent, or college educator). Enables persona-specific analytics and onboarding.

important_fields.name: phone
important_fields.note: Optional phone number for college outreach or follow-up contact. May be collected during signup for institutional partnerships.

important_fields.name: created_at
important_fields.note: Signup timestamp. Used for cohort analysis and trial-to-paid conversion window calculation.

important_fields.name: updated_at
important_fields.type: TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
important_fields.note: Last update timestamp (metadata changes only; does not track product platform interactions).

relationships.note: Each signup may have one or more source attributions (organic, affiliate, college referral).

notes: This table is populated when a user completes the free-trial signup form on the marketing website. The product platform is responsible for trial lifecycle management (trial_expires_at, trial status, expiration enforcement). The marketing website database does NOT manage trial state; it only tracks the initial signup. College referrals are tracked via signup_sources, not a direct foreign key to colleges table.
